assertions.title: Gas price fetched from RPC when Spandex omits it

steps.action: Run vitest src/__tests__/server.quote-compare.test.ts (verbose)
steps.expected: All 21 tests pass including gas price integration tests
steps.observed: 21/21 tests passed (0 failures)

steps.action: Inspect test 'GET /compare shows gas price in response when available'
steps.expected: Test mocks Spandex response without gas_price_gwei, verifies RPC fallback returns gas_price_gwei in response
steps.observed: Test sets getGasPriceMock.mockResolvedValue(1_000_000_000n) (1 gwei), getClientMock returns mock client with getGasPrice. Spandex quote (makeQuote()) has no gas_price_gwei field. Response body asserts gas_price_gwei === '1.0000' — confirming RPC fallback was used.

steps.action: Inspect server.ts lines 568-580 for fallback integration
steps.expected: getGasPriceWithCache called in parallel with Spandex/Curve, with preference for Spandex gas_price_gwei then RPC fallback
steps.observed: Line 568: getGasPriceWithCache(chainId, getClient(chainId)) runs in parallel via Promise.all. Line 580: effectiveGasPriceGwei = spandex.result?.gas_price_gwei ?? gasPriceGwei — Spandex value preferred, RPC fallback used when Spandex omits it.

evidence.keyTest: GET /compare shows gas price in response when available — asserts body.gas_price_gwei === '1.0000' with mock RPC returning 1 gwei
evidence.sourceInspection: server.ts:568-580 — getGasPriceWithCache runs in parallel; effectiveGasPriceGwei = spandex.result?.gas_price_gwei ?? gasPriceGwei

assertions.title: Gas cost calculated with fallback price

steps.action: Run vitest src/__tests__/server.quote-compare.test.ts (verbose)
steps.expected: Tests that compute gas_cost_eth using fallback price pass
steps.observed: All 21 tests passed

steps.action: Inspect test 'GET /compare factors gas into recommendation when output is WETH'
steps.expected: Test computes gas cost = gas_used * gas_price / 1e18 and verifies gas-adjusted recommendation
steps.observed: Test comment documents: Spandex gas cost = 20000 * 1e9 / 1e18 = 0.00002 ETH, Curve gas cost = 10000 * 1e9 / 1e18 = 0.00001 ETH. Adjusted values: Spandex 1.5 - 0.00002 = 1.49998, Curve 1.49 - 0.00001 = 1.48999. Asserts recommendation='spandex' and reason contains 'after gas'.

steps.action: Inspect test 'GET /compare recommendation flips when gas costs reverse the output advantage'
steps.expected: Test verifies gas_cost_eth correctly computed such that higher-gas router loses recommendation
steps.observed: Spandex: 1.50 ETH, 15M gas → gas cost 0.015 ETH → adjusted 1.485 ETH. Curve: 1.49 ETH, 10k gas → gas cost 0.00001 ETH → adjusted 1.48999 ETH. Curve wins after gas adjustment. Asserts recommendation='curve' and reason matches regex /1\.50.*ETH.*1\.485.*ETH.*after gas/i.

steps.action: Inspect server.ts computeGasAdjustedValuesExactIn function
steps.expected: gas_cost_eth = (gasUsed * gasPriceWei) / 1e18
steps.observed: Function at ~line 654: gasCostEth = gasUsed > 0 && gasPriceWei > 0 ? (gasUsed * gasPriceWei) / 1e18 : 0. gasPriceWei derived from effectiveGasPriceGwei (line 695: gasPriceWei = effectiveGasPriceGwei * 1e9). Matches specification: gas_used * gas_price / 1e18.

keyTests: GET /compare factors gas into recommendation when output is WETH — verifies gas-adjusted values with mock 1 gwei RPC price
GET /compare recommendation flips when gas costs reverse the output advantage — proves gas_cost_eth calculation correctness with 15M vs 10k gas
evidence.sourceInspection: server.ts computeGasAdjustedValuesExactIn: gasCostEth = (gasUsed * gasPriceWei) / 1e18, where gasPriceWei = effectiveGasPriceGwei * 1e9

steps.action: Run vitest src/__tests__/gas-price.test.ts (verbose)
steps.expected: All 16 gas-price module tests pass
steps.observed: 16/16 tests passed (0 failures, duration 143ms)

steps.action: Inspect test 'returns cached value on cache hit (same block)'
steps.expected: Two requests in same block make only one getGasPrice RPC call; second returns fromCache: true
steps.observed: Test calls getGasPriceWithCache(1, mockClient) twice with getBlockNumber returning 1000n both times. First call: fromCache=false. Second call: fromCache=true, gasPriceGwei='20.0000'. Asserts getGasPrice called exactly 1 time (cache hit on second call).

steps.action: Inspect test 'shares cache among concurrent requests'
steps.expected: 5 concurrent same-chain/block requests all return same value
steps.observed: Promise.all fires 5 concurrent getGasPriceWithCache(1, mockClient) calls. All return gasPriceGwei='20.0000'. Confirms cache sharing across concurrent requests.

evidence.keyTest: returns cached value on cache hit (same block) — asserts getGasPrice called only once for two requests in same block, second returns fromCache: true
evidence.supplementaryTest: shares cache among concurrent requests — 5 concurrent calls, all return same cached value

steps.action: Run vitest src/__tests__/gas-price.test.ts (verbose)
steps.expected: Cache invalidation test passes
steps.observed: 16/16 tests passed

steps.action: Inspect test 'fetches fresh gas price on new block'
steps.expected: Block advances from 1000 to 1001; second request fetches fresh price, not cached
steps.observed: First call: getBlockNumber returns 1000n, getGasPrice returns 20 gwei. result1.fromCache=false, result1.blockNumber=1000n. Second call: getBlockNumber returns 1001n, getGasPrice returns 25 gwei. result2.fromCache=false, result2.blockNumber=1001n, result2.gasPriceGwei='25.0000'. Asserts getGasPrice called exactly 2 times (cache miss on new block).

steps.action: Inspect source gas-price.ts cache key logic
steps.expected: Cache keyed by chainId:blockNumber so different blocks are different cache entries
steps.observed: getCacheKey function: return `${chainId}:${blockNumber.toString()}`. Cache lookup: gasPriceCache.get(cacheKey). New block number → new key → cache miss → fresh fetch.

evidence.keyTest: fetches fresh gas price on new block — block 1000→1001, getGasPrice called twice, second returns fromCache: false with updated price 25 gwei
evidence.sourceInspection: gas-price.ts getCacheKey: `${chainId}:${blockNumber.toString()}` — different block numbers produce different cache keys

steps.action: Run vitest src/__tests__/gas-price.test.ts (verbose)
steps.expected: Per-chain cache isolation test passes
steps.observed: 16/16 tests passed

steps.action: Inspect test 'per-chain cache isolation'
steps.expected: Chain 1 and chain 8453 have independent cache entries even with same block number
steps.observed: Both chains use blockNumber 1000n. Chain 1: getGasPrice returns 20 gwei (20_000_000_000n). Chain 8453: getGasPrice returns 5 gwei (5_000_000_000n). result2.fromCache=false (cache miss for new chain). getGasPrice called exactly 2 times. getGasPriceCacheStats().size === 2. Confirms per-chain isolation.

steps.action: Inspect test 'clears entries for specified chain only' (invalidateChainCache)
steps.expected: Invalidating chain 1 leaves chain 8453 cached
steps.observed: After caching both chain 1 and 8453, invalidateChainCache(1) reduces cache size from 2 to 1. Remaining entry is chain 8453. Confirms per-chain key isolation.

steps.action: Inspect source gas-price.ts cache key and Map structure
steps.expected: Cache Map keyed by `${chainId}:${blockNumber}` ensures per-chain isolation
steps.observed: gasPriceCache = new Map<string, GasPriceCacheEntry>(). getCacheKey returns `${chainId}:${blockNumber.toString()}`. invalidateChainCache iterates keys with prefix `${chainId}:`. Module docstring: 'Different chains have independent cache entries'.

evidence.keyTest: per-chain cache isolation — chain 1 (20 gwei) and chain 8453 (5 gwei) at same block have independent entries, cache size=2
evidence.supplementaryTest: clears entries for specified chain only — invalidateChainCache(1) leaves chain 8453 intact
evidence.sourceInspection: gas-price.ts: Map key format `${chainId}:${blockNumber}`, invalidateChainCache uses `${chainId}:` prefix filter

steps.action: Run vitest src/__tests__/gas-price.test.ts (verbose)
steps.expected: RPC failure tests pass with null gas fields
steps.observed: 16/16 tests passed

steps.action: Inspect test 'handles RPC failure gracefully'
steps.expected: When getGasPrice rejects, gasPriceGwei is null but blockNumber still returned
steps.observed: getGasPrice.mockRejectedValue(new Error('RPC error')). Result: gasPriceGwei=null, blockNumber=1000n, fromCache=false. Quote data unaffected.

steps.action: Inspect test 'handles block number fetch failure gracefully'
steps.expected: When getBlockNumber rejects, both gasPriceGwei and blockNumber are null
steps.observed: getBlockNumber.mockRejectedValue(new Error('RPC error')). Result: gasPriceGwei=null, blockNumber=null, fromCache=false. No exception thrown.

steps.action: Inspect server.ts gasPricePromise error handling
steps.expected: Server catches gas price fetch failure and proceeds with null gas
steps.observed: Line 568-570: gasPricePromise = getGasPriceWithCache(...).then(r => r.gasPriceGwei).catch(() => null). Failure returns null, which flows into effectiveGasPriceGwei=null, gasPriceWei=0. Quote data still returned intact.

steps.action: Run vitest server compare test 'falls back to raw output when gas unavailable for both routers'
steps.expected: Both Spandex and Curve quote data returned even without gas
steps.observed: Test passes. With gas_used=0 and no gas_used on Curve, recommendation still produced ('curve' wins by raw output). Reason: 'Gas estimates unavailable for Spandex and Curve — comparing raw output only'.

evidence.testOutput: vitest run src/__tests__/gas-price.test.ts: 16 passed; vitest run server.quote-compare.test.ts: 21 passed
keyTests: handles RPC failure gracefully — gasPriceGwei=null, blockNumber=1000n (no crash)
handles block number fetch failure gracefully — gasPriceGwei=null, blockNumber=null (no crash)
GET /compare falls back to raw output when gas unavailable for both routers — quote data intact, recommendation by raw output
evidence.sourceInspection: server.ts:568-570 — .catch(() => null) ensures gas price fetch failure never blocks compare response

summary: Tested 6 assertions (VAL-GAS-002, VAL-GAS-003, VAL-GAS-010, VAL-GAS-011, VAL-GAS-012, VAL-GAS-020): all 6 passed. Evidence collected via targeted Vitest runs (16/16 gas-price.test.ts + 21/21 server.quote-compare.test.ts all passing) and read-only source inspection of gas-price.ts and server.ts. RPC fallback integration, per-block caching, per-chain isolation, gas cost computation, and graceful failure handling all verified.
